title: Easy Shopping® 45 Litre Large Flexi Tub Multipurpose Storage Solution for Home Garden Flexible Plastic Rubber Container Bucket In Several Colour MADE IN U.K. (Yellow)
features: The Flexi Tub is a versatile and practical storage solution designed to make your life easier. Whether you need a container for household items, gardening supplies, or even for use at the beach, this flexible storage tub is the perfect choice. Its design combines functionality with convenience, making it an indispensable tool for any home or outdoor activity.

The Flexi Tub is crafted from high-quality, flexible plastic that ensures durability while maintaining a lightweight structure. This makes it easy to handle and move around, even when fully loaded. Its flexibility also allows it to withstand rough usage without cracking or breaking.

Equipped with sturdy carry handles, the Flexi Tub offers maximum portability. The handles are ergonomically designed to provide a comfortable grip, enabling you to transport the tub effortlessly, regardless of its contents.

To meet diverse needs and preferences, the Flexi Tub comes in multiple sizes and vibrant colors. Whether you need a small tub for personal use or a large one for bigger tasks, there is a Flexi Tub that's just right for you.

In conclusion, the Flexi Tub is more than just a storage container; it's a practical solution for organizing and transporting a wide range of items. Its flexibility, combined with durable materials and thoughtful design, makes it a must-have in every household. Embrace the convenience and versatility of the Flexi Tub for all your storage needs.
Measurements: External Size (including handles): 54cm(W) x 39cm(H), Internal Size: 44cm(Dia) x 34cm(H) Size: 45 Litter (Width- (From Bottom) 45cm, Width- (From Top) 55cm. Height- 35cm Approx.)
